summary: Completed comprehensive backend and frontend testing of Utsav event planning app. Backend: 14/15 tests passed (93.3%). Frontend: All major UI flows working. Critical issue: AI chat endpoint failing due to Gemini schema validation errors.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 502 Bad Gateway. Gemini AI returns invalid JSON with schema validation errors: clarifyingCards[0].options is None instead of list, min/max are date strings instead of numbers for date input type
critical_bugs.impact: BLOCKS core conversational planning flow - users cannot create new events via AI chat
critical_bugs.error_details: Agent failure: 3 validation errors for AgentTurn - clarifyingCards.0.options Input should be a valid list [type=list_type, input_value=None], clarifyingCards.0.min/max unable to parse string as number [type=float_parsing, input_value='2026-07-03']
critical_bugs.suggested_fix: Fix agent.py or schemas.py to handle date input types correctly - date cards should not have min/max as numbers, or Gemini prompt needs to be updated to not return min/max for date inputs

working_endpoints: GET /api/demo - Returns seeded demo wedding with plan, posterUrl, rsvpSummary
GET /api/events/{slug} - Returns event details with rsvpSummary
POST /api/events/{slug}/rsvp - Creates RSVP and updates summary
GET /api/events/{slug}/rsvps - Lists all RSVPs with summary
GET /api/events/{slug}/vendors - Returns vendors from Google Places API (live integration working!)
PATCH /api/events/{slug}/checklist - Updates checklist item done status
PATCH /api/events/{slug}/budget - Updates budget item amount and recalculates total

ui_bugs.issue: Checkbox selector '[data-testid="module-checklist"] input[type="checkbox"]' not finding checkboxes - they may be custom styled buttons/divs instead of native checkboxes
ui_bugs.note: Checklist is visually working and items are displayed correctly, just the test selector needs adjustment

console_warnings.impact: Accessibility warning - does not affect functionality

working_features: Landing page loads with hero title 'Bolo idea. Utsav banaye mehfil.'
Event type chips (Shaadi, Haldi, Naamkaran, etc.) render and prefill textarea on click
Demo event card displays with poster image visible
Event page hero with title, emoji, description, date/time chips, muhurat chip, location chip
RSVP Module: name input, headcount select, Going/Maybe/Can't buttons all working
RSVP flow: submit RSVP, counts update, 'you responded' state appears, toast notification shows
RSVP guest list displays recent responses
Share bar: WhatsApp button href contains wa.me, Directions button href contains google.com/maps, Calendar button href contains calendar.google.com, Copy link button present
Vendors Module: category tabs (Banquet Halls, Caterers, Decorators, etc.) switch categories and load vendor cards
Vendor cards display name, address, rating, price range, Maps link
Vendor shortlist heart button toggles shortlist state (heart fills)
Budget Module: displays total in Indian format (₹40.5 L), +/- buttons adjust amounts, running total updates
Timeline Module: displays 5 functions with dates, times, muhurat chips, descriptions, 'Add to Calendar' links with correct href
Food Module: displays diet type and menu suggestions
Reminders Module: 'Add' button opens dialog, text input works, 'Save' button adds reminder to list
Poster Module: displays generated poster image, 'Download poster' button present

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/demo returns seeded demo wedding
Backend: GET /api/events/{slug} returns event with rsvpSummary
Backend: Vendor search with Google Places API (live data!)
Backend: Checklist, budget, food, reminders PATCH operations
Frontend: Landing page loads with all elements visible
Frontend: Event type chip prefills textarea
Frontend: Event page modules render and are visible
Frontend: RSVP flow end-to-end (name input → submit → counts update → responded state)
Frontend: Share bar links (WhatsApp, Maps, Calendar) have correct hrefs
Frontend: Vendors module category tabs switch and load vendors
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix POST /api/chat endpoint - Gemini AI is returning invalid JSON that fails Pydantic schema validation. The issue is with clarifyingCards for date input types: (1) options field is None instead of empty list, (2) min/max fields contain date strings instead of numbers. This blocks the entire conversational planning flow. Suggested fixes: (a) Update schemas.py ClarifyingCard model to make options optional with default [], (b) Update agent.py SYSTEM_PROMPT to clarify that date input types should NOT have min/max fields or should have them as null, (c) Add better error handling/repair logic in run_agent_turn. Test the fix by calling POST /api/chat with a simple event description.
